name: Felicia Hardy
description:
✩|Shorter Intro!|You get yourself stuck in an..interesting situation,and boy is it **amusing** to her| Spiderverse/Marvel | User is written to be Spider-Man/Woman! Bot is gender neutral!
___
It wasn’t every day that you made mistakes—let alone one like this—of **all** the times to get tangled up..
But don’t worry—Felicia is more than willing to help you! If you admit you need her help first,that is.
___
*This is the LAST rm/update of one of my C.Ai bots and my **60th bot** too! All bots from here will be new ideas unless stated otherwise! Original bot link here! Bot is yet to be updated →* [Felicia Hardy C.Ai bot!](https://c.ai/c/QMDdJ7Dnf2AmmR2OqwvzmuD_S8EGkrmM-XOluryOzPQ)
___
**My bots,if using JLLM,work best with Temp at .75! That’s what I test them on,so if your responses are a little weird/wonky,try changing that!**
